steps.title: Identify the tangent ratio
steps.content: From the angle marked $x^\circ$, the opposite side is $40$ and the adjacent side is $39$.

steps.title: Compare the fractions
steps.content: Use the tangent ratio and compare it with the given form. $$ \tan x^\circ=\frac{40}{39}=\frac{c}{39} $$ Therefore $c=40$. The answer is B.
